channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Perez's homer off Rodón sparks 4-run 4th inning and Royals beat Yankees 4-2 in Game 2 to tie ALDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Salvador Perez homered leading off the fourth inning to spark a four-run rally against Carlos Rodón, and the Kansas City Royals beat the New York Yankees 4-2 on Monday night to even their AL Division Series at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carpenter's 3-run homer off Clase sends gritty Tigers to 3-0 win over Guardians in Game 2 of ALDS
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kerry Carpenter hit a three-run homer off Cleveland's All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase in the ninth inning, and the Detroit Tigers stunned the Guardians 3-0 in Game 2 on Monday to even their AL Division Series at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Israel Soccer fires back at Palestinian officials after suspension proposal
item.description: The Israel Football Association (IFA) provided a statement to Fox News Digital in which it addressed allegations of discrimination by the Palestine federation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Guardians replace injured Tyler Freeman with Ángel Martínez ahead of Game 2 against Tigers
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Guardians utilityman Tyler Freeman sustained an oblique injury during a simulated game Sunday and was dropped from the AL Division Series roster prior to Cleveland hosting Detroit in Game 2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Manny Machado rips Dodgers' Jack Flaherty, says pitcher hit Padres teammate on purpose
item.description: San Diego Padres star Manny Machado called out Los Angeles Dodgers starter Jack Flaherty, who he believes hit Fernando Tatis Jr. with a pitch on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Monday Morning Lights: Our midseason honors, from players of year to games of year
item.description: Bay Area News Group unveils its midseason recognition. Plus, Miramonte's backup QB overcomes nerves, leads Matadors to win; Heritage aiming for school history; Christopher's star QB does more than pass.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupt Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tempers flared on the field and in the stands at Dodger Stadium, with rowdy fans tossing baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of the Padres' 10-2 win in NL Division S
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How AP Top 25 voters ranked the latest poll with Alabama's loss and other upsets
item.description: While fans across the country were on edge watching upset after upset unfold Saturday, Houston Chronicle sports columnist Kirk Bohls and other members of The Associated Press college football poll voting panel were thinking ahead to how they would sort out and arrange the teams they would put on the
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos' Bo Nix, Sean Payton have heated conversation on sideline: 'Sometimes it is my love language'
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix and head coach Sean Payton had a heated conversation in their win over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 6
item.description: A handful of major upsets in college football left fans either in awe or in tears. Alabama and Tennessee were among the team shocked on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How two Central football players are working to get recruited
item.description: A pair of local high school football stars -- Central High School's Jaime Padilla and Antonio Reyes -- are doing everything they can, even traveling the country to show college football programs what they can do.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Tom Brady to announce 49ers-Cardinals game Sunday
item.description: (KRON) -- Tom Brady will announce his first San Francisco 49ers game on Sunday, according to his page on Fox's website. The ex-player considered the Greatest Of All Time by many made the switch to the announcing booth this season.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: From food to murder, Aaron Rodgers talks all things Berkeley ahead of College GameDay appearance
item.description: (KRON) -- The college football world will have its eyes on Berkeley this weekend as Cal hosts ESPN's famous College GameDay show for the first time before its game against No. 8 Miami on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4
